title: The Long Night: The End of the Long Night #got #shorts
description: After years of darkness, the Long Night finally ended—but not without cost. This is how the world survived its darkest era. #ASOIAF #LongNight #Shorts

scenes.narration: After years of endless darkness, something began to change.
scenes.image_prompt: faint light breaking through endless dark sky over frozen land, cinematic fantasy, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The forces of the living and the Children of the Forest pushed back against the Others.
scenes.image_prompt: combined armies advancing through icy battlefield, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Battles were fought in darkness, where fire and steel met ice and death.
scenes.image_prompt: epic clash of fire vs ice forces under dark sky, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Slowly, the tide began to turn—but at a cost no one could fully understand.
scenes.image_prompt: fallen warriors and fading icy forms across battlefield, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Others were driven back, retreating into the far north beyond human reach.
scenes.image_prompt: White Walkers withdrawing into distant frozen wasteland, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: As they vanished, the darkness lifted—and the sun returned for the first time in years.
scenes.image_prompt: sunlight breaking across frozen world as snow begins to melt, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: The Long Night ended, but the world that remained was forever changed.
scenes.image_prompt: scarred landscape transitioning from ice to recovering land, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: To protect against its return, the Wall was raised—a barrier between worlds.
scenes.image_prompt: massive Wall being constructed across northern horizon, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Stories of the Long Night became legend, passed down but never fully understood.
scenes.image_prompt: ancient storytellers recounting events around fire, vertical 1080x1920

scenes.narration: Because the Long Night did not end forever—it only went to sleep.
scenes.image_prompt: icy eyes glowing faintly in far north darkness, ominous cinematic ending, vertical 1080x1920
